query: motion blur photograph long exposure subject in motion
message: anti-aesthetic / clarity_and_focus / intentional_blur: motion blur, long exposure subject motion - artistic streaks and dynamic blur

response.objective_caption: A black and white square image showing indistinct curved and linear forms against a textured surface. A prominent diagonal band stretches from upper left toward center, accompanied by sweeping curved shapes and fine linear striations across the frame. A small copyright notice appears in the bottom right corner.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A heavily motion-blurred black and white abstract photograph where indistinct curved and linear forms dissolve into sweeping gestures against a scratched, textured surface. The intentional blur and low contrast create an oppressive, dreamlike atmosphere where subjects are unrecognizable, reduced to pure shape, movement, and tone. A small copyright notice appears in the bottom right corner.
